Interface IGeneralMultiPatchInfo2

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geometry
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geometry.dll

Interface to get information of a GeneralMultiPatch.

[Guid("940702DC-3095-4332-9D8E-2D6B60EAD969")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface IGeneralMultiPatchInfo2 : IGeneralMultiPatchInfo
